user.title: Xiaomi Cloud Configuration
user.description:
Please configure the Xiaomi Cloud service connection.

For help with deployment, see:
https://github.com/MagicStarTrace/xiaomi_cloud

data.enable_gaode_more_info: Show Gaode Map in device details (requires gaode_maps)

error.base_url_required: Playwright service URL cannot be empty.
error.invalid_url: URL must start with http:// or https://

init.title: Xiaomi Cloud Options
init.description:
Location polling automatically switches between 1, 5, and 10 minutes based on entity movement speed.

For help with deployment, see:
https://github.com/MagicStarTrace/xiaomi_cloud

data.enable_active_locate: Enable Active Location (trigger Xiaomi Cloud real-time locate)
data.enable_gaode_more_info: Show Gaode Map in device details (requires gaode_maps)
